---
title: "Data Preprocessing"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Glioblastoma ERβ Isoform Explorer - Data Preprocessing and Gene Annotation Workflow

**Installing and Loading Required Packages**

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

install.packages(c("shiny", "ggplot2", "dplyr", "tidyr", "readr"))
BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(shiny) 
library(ggplot2) 
library(dplyr) 
library(tidyr) 
library(readr)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
```

**Data Reading and Cleaning**

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

data <- read_tsv("GSE104296_norm_counts_TPM_GRCh38.p13_NCBI.tsv.gz")

data_df <- as.data.frame(data)
rownames(data_df) <- data_df$GeneID
data_clean <- data_df[, -1]

# Create Metadata
meta <- data.frame(
    sample = c("GSM2794663", "GSM2794664", "GSM2794665", "GSM2794666", 
               "GSM2794667", "GSM2794668", "GSM2794669", "GSM2794670"),
    condition = c("Control", "Control", "ERb-KO", "ERb-KO", 
                  "ERb1", "ERb1", "ERb5", "ERb5")
)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

# Check if rows match columns
all(colnames(data_clean) == meta$sample)
```

**Gene Annotation**

```{r}
all_ids <- as.character(rownames(data_clean))
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
#| message: false

# Annotating Genes
mapping_results <- AnnotationDbi::select(org.Hs.eg.db, 
                                        keys = all_ids, 
                                        columns = c("SYMBOL", "GENENAME"), 
                                        keytype = "ENTREZID")
```

```{r}
# Processing results
mapping_table <- mapping_results %>%
  dplyr::distinct(ENTREZID, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  dplyr::rename(GeneID = ENTREZID, 
                Symbol = SYMBOL, 
                `Gene Name / Type` = GENENAME)


readr::write_csv(mapping_table, "mapped_genes.csv")
```
